title: oreojuncus trifidus
side_effects: Oreojuncus trifidus can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can also lead to cardiovascular problems, including hypertension and arrhythmia. In rare cases, improper use of Oreojuncus trifidus may cause allergic reactions, resulting in symptoms like hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Additionally, high doses may interact with other medications, such as blood thinners and diabetes medications, potentially exacerbating underlying health conditions.
